Description: Overhead doors -- industrial sectional 24 ft class (supply + install including tracks and hardware)

Description: Overhead door operators -- motorised industrial (supply + install)
Notes: One operator per door; voltage/amperage TBD per IFC door schedule and PKG-015 coordination

Description: Door safety devices -- obstruction sensors and auto-reverse mechanism (supply + install per door)
Notes: Per Alberta Safety Codes expectation for motorised industrial doors; ASSUMPTION-based requirement

Description: Door weather seals -- head / jamb / floor seal sets (supply + install per door)
Notes: Alberta cold climate; heated interior; weather seal sets for insulated bay

Description: Door frame structural elements -- jambs / sills / headers / lintels (4 openings)

Notes: Structural rough openings for 4 overhead door locations; CIP concrete headers/lintels per structural design

Description: Floor drainage slope provisions -- repair bay concrete slab slope to sump drain locations
Notes: Concrete finishing for floor slope in each bay; slope % TBD per civil/structural engineer; 2 bays

Description: Exhaust system structural provisions -- blocking / backing / penetration sleeves / mounting provisions
Notes: Structural provisions for exhaust hose drops and fan units in repair bay area; scope is structural only

Description: Conduit sleeves for overhead door operator wiring (4 locations)
SourceSection: Step 2.2 -- conduit sleeves for overhead door operator wiring
Notes: Conduit stub-ins for PKG-015 electrical coordination; placed during structural rough-in

Description: Door commissioning and functional testing (3 cycles per door x 4 doors)
SourceSection: Step 3.4 -- Commission and Test Each Door
Notes: Three complete open/close cycles per door; safety device and weather seal verification

Description: Inspection coordination and documentation
Notes: All required inspections per building permit and Safety Code permit conditions

Notes: As-built markups for bay dimensions and door rough openings; compilation of all records
